title: Bitcoin will get ‘lift’ from Hyperliquid, Robinhood in next crypto bull market: Bitwise exec
summary: Bitwise predicted that Hyperliquid and Robinhood TradFi ventures should form the basis for a crypto bull-market comeback that would lift Bitcoin and Ether.

title: Coinbase to expand Singapore office headcount by 25%: report
summary: Coinbase plans to expand its Singapore office from 150 to about 200 employees by the end of 2026 as it grows its presence in the Lion City.

title: Gold Falls as Middle East Conflict Curbs Dip-Buying Momentum
summary: Gold fell as the escalating conflict in the Middle East continued to push up energy prices, fueling bets the Federal Reserve will tighten monetary policy to contain inflation.

title: Roche Cuts Generic Impact Estimate, Pointing to More Growth
summary: Roche Holding’s results showed a slower-than-expected recovery for eye blockbuster Vabysmo as investors look to a key new drug to power growth ahead.

title: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
summary: The exploit hit a custody bridge AFX operates rather than the Arbitrum network itself, with the stolen funds quickly moved to Ethereum.

title: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
summary: The crypto derivatives pioneer told users to close positions and withdraw funds before it goes dark on September 23.

title: ‘Not currently the right capital solution’: Smarter Web sells 178 bitcoin to repay $11.7M convertible instrument
summary: The Smarter Web Company sold 177.89 BTC at $65,762 to repay $11.7 million to TOBAM early, cancelling 7.7 million in potential share issuance.

title: Circle partners with Kakao, Toss Bank to explore stablecoin payment rails in South Korea
summary: Circle plans to explore blockchain-based payment infrastructure in South Korea through partnerships with Kakao and Toss.
